title: MD
biography: William Harvey was an English physician who first correctly described the circulatory system in 1628, demonstrating that the heart pumps blood through a closed circuit of arteries and veins.
aiSummary: William Harvey is a physiology specialist at St Bartholomew's Hospital. Based in United Kingdom.

timeline.title: Published De Motu Cordis
timeline.description: Described the systemic circulation of blood pumped by the heart through arteries and returned via veins
